title: USD Layer-Stack Namespace Source Performance Contract

included: direct layer-stack construction from already-opened document-model Layers
contributing-spec lookup by prim or property path
same-typed authored listOp field composition across contributing specs
excluded: reference, payload, inherits, specializes, variant, and relocate evaluation

model.construction_budget: Source construction should build path-to-contributing-spec indexes or equivalent structures over supplied stack layers once, rather than scanning every layer for every query.
model.lookup_budget: Prim/property lookup should scale with the number of contributing specs at the queried path, not total specs in the layer stack.
model.child_ordering_budget: Composed child ordering should be cached per queried prim or computed from indexed contributing specs, not recomputed by scanning unrelated paths.
model.property_ordering_budget: Composed property ordering should be cached per queried prim or computed from indexed contributing specs and usd-paths ordering, not resorted from adapter JSON on every query.
model.memory_budget: The provider should retain references/handles to document-model layers, paths, tokens, and fields where possible and avoid duplicating canonical JSON layer dumps.

build_source.expected_complexity: O(L + S) where L is stack layer count and S is total supplied specs indexed from direct stack entries.

prim_input.expected_complexity: O(K + C) where K is contributing prim specs at the path and C is composed child count.

property_input.expected_complexity: O(K + F) where K is contributing property specs at the path and F is distinct exposed field count.

child_names.expected_complexity: O(K + C) after path lookup, where K is contributing prim specs and C is distinct child names.

property_names.expected_complexity: O(K + P log P) or better after path lookup, where P is distinct property names and path-element ordering is provided by usd-paths.

shape_gates: queries against one path should not rescan all specs in all layers
adding unrelated specs to weak layers should not materially change prim_input timing for a hot path
repeated child/property queries should use cached or bounded ordering work
measurement.note: Concrete machine-specific thresholds should live in benchmark target files once adapters exist. This contract defines the first composition provider's measurement model.
